name: @yesid/gates
description: Brand vitest gates as pure, parameterized engines + presets. Detection logic is byte-equivalent to the source gates: tokens-only + contrast floors from yesid.dev @ 2bdb611d (style-regressions / contrast-floors), no-raw-brand-hex + dataviz-doctrine from transit (brand-doctrine / tokens-aa). tv()-only-in-ui is MINTED here (no test existed in either repo — it codifies the observed convention). Engines are test-runner-agnostic (node:fs only); consumers wire them into their own describe/it blocks.
